pluginstrument.author: David Chambers
pluginstrument.description:
Replicates any of the popular Garmin 327-330 series transponders which all share the same user interface. Includes flight, count-up, count-down timers and altitude monitor. Will always display flight level/altitude based on standard pressure altitude rather than what is displayed on the altimeter.
Power up by pressing and holding any of ON/STANDBY/ALT buttons Power down by pressing and holding the OFF button Both battery (or alternator with engine running) and avionics master must be on.
Configurable for model number, default VFR code, FL/Feet display, rounded or rectangular backplate and optional dimming.
